items.name_en: Small 👄L New Geometric Bag, lightweight, versatile styling. The new solid Puzzle Lo Pink is a must-have! The highlight is this season's satin calfskin, which is smoother, glossier, and holds its shape better. The strap, metal buckle, and lining are all color-coordinated, offering a novel yet high-end look. The wide strap design is a pleasant surprise, and the back zip pocket has been replaced by a small pocket. The new ceiling item! Just buy it. Model: L10172B, Size: 24*10*14cm

Small 24-14-11
🎨 Model 30012
The new favorite LOEWE Puzzle features a gradient color scheme that looks like sunset hues woven into the bag body
The woven handle is exquisite and unique, giving a relaxed vibe when carried casually
The 3D geometric shape is super spacious, perfect for daily outings or short trips 🎒
Just stuff everything in and go
Wear it on the street and turn heads instantly
Finally understand why fashionistas love LOEWE
Practical and stylish, whoever wears it becomes a walking fashion recommendation 🌿

items.name_en: Small Lunch Box Bag~Trending Shoulder Bag Cubi Embroidery Design. The design exudes a premium feel; pairing it with a simple white T-shirt creates a wonderful chemistry. The adjustable strap is well-thought-out without excessive fuss. Simply click to secure and free your hands. It looks good as a handbag, underarm, or shoulder bag. Large capacity and lightweight. Get ready to turn heads! size: 21-12-17

items.name_en: Small size 👄L Classic hammock bag, free-folding zipper design, can also hold a MacBook and A4 notebook. Two small pockets on the sides, perfect for a Plus phone and important cards. If you feel it's not big enough, unzip it for massive storage! With this bag, work and travel are worry-free... Versatile styles, easy to match with any outfit, even casual wear is effortless. If you go for a ladylike style, wrap a silk scarf around the handle, and the bag becomes soft and you are perfect! A bag with a fairy-like aura, gentle and elegant is its name. Such understated elegance is a favorite for the artsy crowd. Unique style, walk your own path, those who like it should get one! Spanish calfskin, the material and feel are impeccable. Top-tier leather gets softer and more textured the more you wear it! Top-tier custom hardware, lining, imported YKK zipper, ZP craftsmanship, presented beautifully. Bring the Luo family's 'transforming little diamond' to the fashion world! Size: 29*14*26cm

items.name_en: Sophisticated and stylish
items.name_cn: Sophisticated and stylish

specs.rawTitle: Sophisticated and stylish

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of patent calfskin + suede lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing, and a vintage yet stylish vibe!
Double zipper closure. Although mini and exquisite, it has enough capacity for powder, phone, tissues, etc.!
The mini size looks relaxed whether carried by hand or crossbody!
This Amazona is definitely a treasure this year💗
mini model number 89351 size 20*11.5*7 (box gift bag)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of fine soft matte calfskin + patent calfskin + suede Napa sheepskin lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing + retro briefcase silhouette.
The large size looks cool and is photogenic when worn under the arm.
The interior has a magnetic closure and is quite spacious!
Three carrying ways: Hand, underarm, or crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a "natural and casual" French lazy vibe!
Large model number 89357-1
size:34.5*27*14 (gift bag only)

specs.rawTitle:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of fine soft matte calfskin + patent calfskin + suede Napa sheepskin lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing + retro briefcase silhouette.
The large size looks cool and is photogenic when worn under the arm.
The interior has a magnetic closure and is quite spacious!
Three carrying ways: Hand, underarm, or crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a "natural and casual" French lazy vibe!
Large model number 89357-1
size:34.5*27*14 (gift bag only)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of smooth nappa leather and patent calfskin with suede lining, the leather gets better with time!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing, full of retro and chic vibes!
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn on the shoulder, carried by hand, or crossbody; three styles to switch between! The handbag style is professional for commuting, while the crossbody gives a casual, relaxed look. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Small model number 89356 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box and gift bag included)

items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, the calfskin is soft, smooth, and premium. The leather develops a beautiful patina over time!
Classic silhouette, iconic Anagram embossing, and a perfect blend of vintage and modern vibes.
Double zipper closure with ample capacity, suitable for commuting or dates.
Small size can be worn crossbody, handheld, or shoulder; three ways to switch freely! The handheld look is professional for work, while crossbody gives a relaxed casual feel. Very practical!
This Amazona 180 is definitely a treasure this year 💗
Item No. 89352 Dimensions 24✕18.5*10 (box, gift bag)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, it feels soft and luxurious!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing and retro briefcase shape.
The large size looks cool and is perfect for shoulder carry.
Magnetic closure inside with a large capacity!
Three carrying styles: Handbag, Shoulder, and Crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a natural, French "laid-back" vibe!
Large model number 89353
Dimensions 34.5*27*14 (gift bag included)
